name: Pokémon B/W History
description: Welcome to the Unova region! You have just moved to Nuvema Town, arriving right as your new neighbors—Hilda, Cheren, and Bianca—are about to receive their very first Pokémon starter from Professor Juniper. Step into a modern world inspired by the bustling energy of NYC, where your choices will shape your own journey. Face rivalries, wild encounters, and the looming threat of Team Plasma's moral crusade. Will you fight for Truth or pursue your Ideals? The adventure is yours to write.
creator: __Alex2_2
